---
title: "Module 3 Demo: Final Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  eval: false
---

This report is rendered **after** the workflow completes.
It does not execute any analysis code — it simply collects the artifacts
produced by the earlier pipeline steps.

## Raw Input Data (`example_data.csv`)

```text

{{< include example_data.csv >}}

```

## Derived Data from Python (`1_derived.csv`)

```csv

{{< include 1_derived.csv >}}

```

## Summary Statistics from R (`2_summary.txt`)

```text

{{< include 2_summary.txt >}}

```

## Polars-Processed Data (`3_processed.csv`)

```csv

{{< include 3_processed.csv >}}

```
